question: Which of these UA operation is not considered as non-recreation or non-education purpose?

options.text: An organiser conducting competitive UA races.
A volunteer using a UA to take photographs and videos for a charity event.
An individual who took aerial photographs using his UA and use them for marketing purpose, regardless of whether there are any monetary exchanges.
An individual flying a UA higher than 200 feet above mean sea level for aerial photography for personal collection.
